config_template.padded_shape: [{PAD_DIM0}, {PAD_DIM1}, {PAD_DIM2}, {PAD_DIM3}] (optional; states logical vs tile-padded shape, e.g. logical batch B vs padded 32)
config_template.memory_config: {MEMORY_CONFIG} (optional; passthrough of input memory config when omitted)

placement_observations.tensor_role: activation (prefill input to FF1/FF3 or QKV matmul, folded [1,1,S,H] -> [1,S/CHUNK,CHUNK,H])
placement_observations.size_descriptor: seq_len >= prefill_len_cutoff (512 Blackhole / 1024 Wormhole) or seq_len > MAX_QKV_MM_SEQ_LEN (1024/2048)
placement_observations.source: llama/mistral MLP and attention prefill forward: x = ttnn.reshape(x, [1, seq_len // self.args.prefill_len_cutoff, self.args.prefill_len_cutoff, -1]); inverse reshape back to [1,1,seq_len,-1] after the matmul

attention prefill: if seq_len > 1024: attn_output_11SH = ttnn.reshape(attn_output_11SH, [1, seq_len // 1024, 1024, -1]); output_11SH reshaped back to [1,1,seq_len,-1] after ttnn.linear(memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)

placement_observations.tensor_role: activation (q/k/v head-split reshape in encoder self-attention)
placement_observations.source: conformer/whisper-style attention: proj = ttnn.reshape(proj, (batch, seq_len, num_heads, head_dim), memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG)  # pinned to L1 to hide DRAM writeback (~14% of layer kernel time when DRAM)

placement_observations.tensor_role: input (sharded tensor must be moved to DRAM interleaved before reshape with sub_core_grids, then restored)

memory_config.layout: TILE_LAYOUT, interleaved (sharded input round-tripped through DRAM)
memory_config.shard_spec_template: orig_mem_cfg restored via ttnn.to_memory_config after reshape

placement_observations.source: rope_setup sub-core-grid path: x_dram = ttnn.to_memory_config(x, ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG); x_reshaped = ttnn.reshape(x_dram, [1, 64 if use_qk_fused else 32, 1, 128], sub_core_grids=sub_core_grids); x_restored = ttnn.to_memory_config(x_reshaped, orig_mem_cfg)

placement_observations.tensor_role: activation (MoE router input flattened to (-1, hidden_dim); downstream buffer chosen by token count)
placement_observations.source: MoE forward: hidden_states = ttnn.reshape(hidden_states, (-1, self.hidden_dim)); is_decode = actual_tokens <= 128; mem_config = ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG if is_decode else ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG

placement_observations.tensor_role: activation (rank-promotion to 4D [1,1,B*S,H] before CCL all_gather/reduce_scatter, reshaped back after)
placement_observations.source: ccl_manager: if rank < 4: tensor = ttnn.reshape(tensor, [1]*(4-rank) + list(tensor.shape)); ... tensor = ttnn.reshape(tensor, list(tensor.shape)[4-rank:]) after the collective

placement_observations.tensor_role: input (matmul operand with padded_shape, unit-test reference)
placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn_input_a = ttnn.from_torch(..., layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG); ttnn_input_a = ttnn.reshape(ttnn_input_a, input_a_shape, padded_shape=(4096, 32)) followed by ttnn.matmul

placement_observations.tensor_role: activation (tilized reshape workaround: convert to ROW_MAJOR before reshape to avoid hang, then back to TILE)
placement_observations.size_descriptor: any (workaround for tt-metal issue #29932 on tilized multi-dim merges)
placement_observations.source: qwen-vl patch merger: x = ttnn.to_layout(x, ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT); x = ttnn.reshape(x, (x.shape[0], x.shape[1], -1, self.mlp_size)); x = ttnn.to_layout(x, ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT)
